title: At a Cafe
description: Order coffee, ask about the menu, and use polite phrases in a cafe or bakery.

content.title: Ordering Basics
content.description: These phrases will help you ask for drinks, food, and the bill.

content.note: A short and natural way to order.
A more formal and polite way to order.
Useful when you sit down and want to look at the options.
One of the most practical cafe phrases.

content.title: Cafe Vocabulary
content.description: A small set of words you will see on menus and hear from staff.

rows: Good for a bakery or cafe

content.title: Useful Conversation
content.description: Mini dialogs make ordering easier to remember.

content.note: A helpful question if you do not know what to order.
A natural sentence in a cafe setting.
A very useful preference to express.

content.title: Practice
content.description: A quick quiz and one reminder for polite service.

content.title: Polite form
content.text: In cafes, polite phrases are very common. Even a short 'Моля' makes your request sound softer and more natural.

content.question: How do you say 'The bill, please.'?
content.note: This phrase is especially useful when you are finishing your drink or meal.
